assertions.assertion: Identifies MapInboundClaims as the root cause — the JWT bearer handler renames 'sub' to the long Microsoft XML namespace URI
assertions.rationale: This is a well-known issue in the ASP.NET Core community

assertions.assertion: Shows setting options.MapInboundClaims = false on the JWT bearer handler
Mentions JwtClaimTypes.Subject or the short name 'sub' vs the long http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/ws/2005/05/identity/claims/nameidentifier URI
assertions.rationale: The long URI is commonly referenced in community discussions

assertions.assertion: Does NOT suggest the claim is missing from the token itself
assertions.rationale: The prompt says 'I can see the claim in the token when I decode it at jwt.io' — any reasonable LLM would not suggest it's missing
